text: Science has a clearer story about convolutional nets than social media does. Convolutional neural networks, or CNNs, mimic how our brains recognize patterns. They process images in layers, filtering and improving accuracy at each step. This architecture has revolutionized image classification and facial recognition. So next time you see AI in action, remember it's backed by this powerful idea. Curious about more tech insights? Like and follow for deeper dives!
